heading: Omitted
label: 226 to 239 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 226 to 239, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 226, , , prescribed penalties for violation of fishing laws.act June 6, 1924, ch. 272, § 643 Stat. 466Section 227, , , empowered Director of Fish and Wildlife Service to designate employees as peace officers.act June 6, 1924, ch. 272, § 643 Stat. 466Section 228, , , provided that nothing in sections 221 to 224, 226 to 228, and 232 to 234 of this title shall not abrogate or curtail any territorial powers.act June 6, 1924, ch. 272, § 843 Stat. 467Section 229, , , enumerated powers of bird reservation wardens.act May 31, 1920, ch. 21741 Stat. 717Section 230, , , established a license tax on canning fish.act June 26, 1906, ch. 3547, § 134 Stat. 478Section 231, acts , ;
